← Back to Works AMS / Workforce Monitoring

Project — Industrial SaaS

AMS
Tablet

Automated Pre-Shift Workforce Monitoring System

AMS is an industrial комплекс for automated pre-shift inspection and workforce verification at checkpoints.

Industry Industrial / Gov
Platform Android Tablet + Web Dashboard
Status Live · 10+ Deployments
01

Problem

01

Manual inspections are unreliable

02

Drunk / unhealthy workers on site

03

Time fraud & falsified check-ins

04

Outdated inspection methods

02

How It Works

01

Face Recognition

AWS Rekognition — real-time identity verification

02

Temperature Check

Infrared sensor integration — automated fever detection

03

Breath Alcohol Detection

Hardware breathalyzer module — BAC threshold enforcement

04

Pulse & Oxygen Monitoring

SpO₂ sensor — heart rate and blood oxygen screening

System Flow
Employee → AMS Tablet → Verification → Dashboard → Analytics
03

Admin Dashboard

  • CRUD Employee Management

    Add, edit, deactivate and archive employee records with role-based access controls.

  • Attendance Tracking

    Automated time-stamped shift logs with pass/fail status per inspection.

  • Health Status Logs

    Per-employee health history: temperature, BAC, SpO₂ across all shifts.

  • Push Notifications

    Instant alerts for late workers, failed inspections, and critical health flags.

  • ERP / 1C Integration

    Native sync with 1C:Enterprise and compatible ERP systems for payroll and HR data flow.

04

Traction

10+ Active Deployments
Gov Government & Industrial Clients
Regional Government Office (Akimat)
Police Department
Manufacturing Plants
Construction Sites
Industrial Service Companies

05

Market

Kazakhstan industrial & ERP market — workforce compliance software segment.

TAM Total Addressable Market ~$420M

All KZ enterprises subject to pre-shift health screening regulations

SAM Serviceable Addressable Market ~$85M

Industrial, gov, construction & transport sectors with 50+ employees

SOM Serviceable Obtainable Market ~$12M

Reachable within 3 years via direct sales & ERP partner channels
